title: Junior Business Development Manager at Phoenix Mills

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Phoenix Mills
jsonLd.description:
Phoenix Mills, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!
